notes: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, 8,000+ packs: normal V 11.55%, VMAX/VSTAR 3.72%, full-art V 2.10%, full-art trainer 1.01%, alt-art V 0.60% (all full/alt arts merged into ultra-rare), radiant 4.55%, Trainer Gallery 12.23% incl. gold-and-black VMAX 0.90% (reverse slot), rainbow 1.26%, gold 0.94% — hit rate just under 31%. Rare-holo share (25.35%) from an independent 718-pack DigitalTQ sample, also used to split VMAX/VSTAR (VSTAR 2.33%, VMAX 1.39%). Residual mass on non-holo rare; reverse filler 50/50 common/uncommon. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card. SWSH ETB contains 8 packs.
